name: Be King
short_description: Be king is a decision taking game, and you can loose if you take the wrong decisions! Taking and making the right decisions is what you need to ensure you keep increasing your empire in size, and in power!
detailed_description:
BE KING


Inspired by reigns and many other games , this small adventure! will make you take the role of a King.
And as a king you must make the best decisions for your empire, and ensure it stands!

About this Game


Be king is a decision taking game, and you can loose if you take the wrong decisions!
Taking and making the right decisions is what you need to ensure you keep increasing your empire in size, and in power!

Features


  • Colorfull
  • 20 decisions that repeats over and over again!
  • Choices-Matter
  • Strategical Management
  • Cozy and relaxing.
  • Being a king could be fun, who knows?
